title: VETERAN CENTER OF EXCELLENCE - 211info
text: CLARK COLLEGE VETERAN CENTER OF EXCELLENCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides general information about VA education benefits, advises on VA eligibility, and assists individuals with applying for VA education benefits. Serves as a liaison between the school and the Department of Veterans Affairs to ensure compliance with VA education regulations and continued receipt of benefits for eligible students. Tuition waivers are available. 1933 Fort Vancouver Way Vancouver, WA 98663 Eligibility: Veterans, dependents, reservists, National Guard, and Active Duty Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm, Friday 8am-4:30pm Email (360) 992-2073 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (360) 992-2073 FAX (360) 992-2864 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of military service (DD-214), a Certificate of Eligibility, and additional documentation for dependents and waivers, as required based on individual circumstances LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Benefits and Services Assistance * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Student Financial Aid * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - CLARK COLLEGE SPECIALTY MEDICINE - DENTAL HYGIENE CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CLARK COLLEGE
